footnotes.label: Age for apprenticeship participation is based on age as at 31 August of the academic year.
Age for starts is based on age at the start of the programme.

Data prior to 2014/15 adapted from previously published Level, SSA and data framework tool for starts and apprenticeships-participation-by-level-age for participation - click links for detailed footnotes. Data from 2014/15 onwards extracted from ILR database. Figures are rounded to the nearest 10 except for Grand Totals for starts and all data for participation prior to 2014/15, which are rounded to 100.

Participation at intermediate, advanced and higher levels is a count of learners that participated at those levels at any point during the year. Learners undertaking more than one course will only appear once at each level but can appear in the count at more than one level.
Total starts are the count of apprenticeships started at any point during the stated academic period. Learners starting more than one Apprenticeship will appear more than once.
Where shown, figures for 2025/26 are provisional and cover the first two quarters (Aug to Jan). Figures for other years are final and cover the full year (Aug to July).
